name: Adams Bus Svc LLC
recent_news: FMCSA SAFER shows active intrastate non-hazmat passenger carrier (USDOT 3133933), 5 power units / 6 drivers; no M&A news.
fit_notes: Micro single-operator outfit in St. Mary's Co., MD. Too small to be a standalone Summit tuck-in; could only matter as a route/asset roll-up alongside other MD micros.

name: Frye Transportation Svc
districts_or_customers: St. Mary's County Public Schools area (inferred)
recent_news: No press/M&A coverage found; appears to be an owner-operator household-based contractor in Leonardtown, MD. Distinct from Frye Transportation Group of Beaver County, PA.
fit_notes: Sole-proprietor / 1-2 bus contractor — below Summit tuck-in size threshold. Only relevant in a multi-contractor MD route consolidation play.

name: Aksamit Trans Of CGB
recent_news: Family-owned MN contractor founded 2000; began with 6 buses acquired from prior operator, grew to ~100 buses serving multiple districts; MSBOA member. No recent M&A.
fit_notes: NOTE: 'Aksamit Trans Of CGB' is a satellite/yard listing in Graceville, MN; parent is Aksamit Transportation Inc., HQ Long Prairie, MN. Real entity is ~100-bus family-owned MN contractor — credible Summit tuck-in candidate in Upper Midwest; worth diligencing succession and parent-company status separately.

name: Canby Bus Svc Inc
recent_news: Address 201 E Highway 14, Tyler, MN 56178 matches Tyler Bus Service Inc (USDOT 945776), a family-owned MN school bus operator running 'since the late 60s.' Dataset name 'Canby Bus Svc' appears to be a mislabel/alternate registration tied to the same Tyler MN site; no independent web presence found for 'Canby Bus Svc Inc.'
fit_notes: Likely the same operating entity as Tyler Bus Service Inc (Tyler, MN) — family-owned, ~60-year-old small MN contractor. Possible Summit tuck-in if dataset duplication confirmed and successor/founder is open to exit; verify legal-entity structure before outreach.

name: Progressive Education Bus Co
service_types: school (likely activity/charter only — NC public school home-to-school is district-operated)
recent_news: No website, news, or NC SOS-visible activity found. Registered to a residential address (165 Legacy Lakes Dr, Wallace, NC 28466). In NC, regular home-to-school transport is run by county school districts directly, so any private 'school bus' entity is typically a charter/activity-bus or church-school operator.
fit_notes: Almost certainly sub-scale (residence-registered, 2 employees) and in a state where public districts self-operate buses — not an attractive standalone Summit tuck-in target. Likely a charter/activity-only operator; deprioritize.
